LCC-HS9-L4-300650-HSSCIES-DBC-NAV-02 • HS9 HSSCIES • Energy Flow Variations and Resulting Climate Changes

The Salmonberry Shade

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the girl asking the boy to help her do?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the boy say they should space the planks wider on the south side?
3QUESTION 3: What does the boy mean when he says they are trying to let the right amount of sun in?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Write three things: what kind of project the girl and boy are doing, why the boy says the spacing has to be wider on the south side, and what the students want the shade pattern to do for the plot.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  NGSS HS-ESS2-4  |  HS Science: Earth & Space Science
